ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "stars" TEXT /* Star rating of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie plot */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the actor */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor in the movie */,
  "order_of_appearance" INTEGER /* Order in which the actor appears in the credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Actor, Best Director) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Name of the recipient of the award */,
  "ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
